en.extract:
Johanna's sunbird (Cinnyris johannae) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is widely spread across the African tropical rainforest.  It is named after Johanna Verreaux, wife of French naturalist Édouard Verreaux.

'''Johanna's sunbird''' ('''''Cinnyris johannae''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]]. It is widely spread across the [[Tropical forest|African tropical rainforest]].  It is named after Johanna Verreaux, wife of French naturalist [[Édouard Verreaux]].<ref>{{Cite book |last1=Beolens |first1=Bo |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=g_3QDwAAQBAJ |title=The Eponym Dictionary of Birds |last2=Watkins |first2=Michael |last3=Grayson |first3=Michael |date=2020-03-19 |publisher=Bloomsbury Publishing |isbn=978-1-4729-8269-8 |language=en}}</ref>
